title: NEXUS: Heart
description: The official modpack for NEXUS: Heart, run under Citrine Studios and hosted by cupstv.
body:
# NEXUS: Heart
NEXUS: Heart is a modpack designed to be played in a survival-multiplayer environment with many features that make it cozy, yet still entertaining for a dash of combat. It was originally hosted by cupstv, and is accessible through this Modrinth pack only.

This modpack should also be somewhat compatible with all operating systems, but there are workarounds listed below. It works perfectly fine on Windows, macOS and Linux (tested with Linux Mint).

Please also make sure that you have the latest version of the modpack. Older versions will not be maintained, as most issues will be fixed in the later versions.

**The authors and creators of this modpack do not take credit for the mods included, and they will not monetise the modpack itself as the rights belong to those who authored the included mods (even for mods with open-source licenses).**

## Requirements & Instructions
- This modpack requires 3-4GB of RAM for smoother gameplay. If you have more RAM to share, you may be a little bit more lenient with the resource allocation.
- It is **highly recommended** to run this in a server environment with friends, as that was its intended purpose. However, you may run this in a solo/singleplayer environment.

## Highlighted Mods
- **Origins** - enhances the variety of gameplay through many interesting species to play, with their own gimmicks and disadvantages
- **Create** - allows for more in-depth automation and creation for industrial machines, factories, items, and etc.
- **Farmer's Delight** - allows for a variety of foods to be created and made, enhancing immersion and gameplay
- **Exposure** - allows you to capture the world around you with an intuitive photography system which also allows exports if needed :D
- **Enchancement** - overhauls the entire enchantment system with less RNG, less stat-modification, and more fun!
- and many more!

## Highlighted Resource Pack
- Whimscape and Accompanying Mod Patches (v1.1.2-R and below) - brings a fresh and cozy vibe to the game, and makes it look super nice even without shaders (and is made possible through multiple resource pack patches for certain mods!)

## Workarounds
- This modpack uses Origins Cap, which breaks during singleplayer and shows "AWAITING SERVER RESPONSE". You must disable this mod manually if you want to play in singleplayer.

## Credits
Thank you to all the mod authors who made such amazing mods out of their own passion and free time. I give my respects to those who have made it possible to build such amazing opportunities in the modded Minecraft experience.
